docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-18-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER IN THE MATER OF JIANXIONG FENG NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO RELEASE MECHANIC'S LIEN. TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON JULY 6, 2026. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES REAL PROPERTY LAW AND MOTION MATTERS PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. ALL PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO THAT DEPARTMENT IMMEDIATELY WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
